# Artifact Sets
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Artifact%20Sets&prop=wikitext

Whenever you equip a complete Artifact set you increase all your stats by 5 and your hp and mp by 50. There are a total of 21 artifact sets:

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Sets</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Dragon Tamer</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Indomptable.png
| link = Indomptable
| text = Indomptable
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = HelmOfDraconicDominance.png
| link = Helm of Draconic Dominance
| text = Helm of Draconic Dominance
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ZaarvoxsHeart.png
| link = Zaarvox’s Heart
| text = Zaarvox’s Heart
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AmuletOfDrakefyre.png
| link = Amulet of Drakefyre
| text = Amulet of Drakefyre
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Flesh Collector</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SymbioticRipper.png
| link = Symbiotic Ripper
| text = Symbiotic Ripper
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ParasiticConcoction.png
| link = Parasitic Concoction
| text = Parasitic Concoction
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RagsOfTheHost.png
| link = Rags of the Host
| text = Rags of the Host
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HivemindCirclet.png
| link = Hivemind Circlet
| text = Hivemind Circlet
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Hollow King</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = EdictumPraetoris.png
| link = Edictum Praetoris
| text = Edictum Praetoris
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = MementoMori.png
| link = Memento Mori
| text = Memento Mori
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TogaPicta.png
| link = Toga Picta
| text = Toga Picta
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Interregnum.png
| link = Interregnum
| text = Interregnum
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Horrific Sorcerer</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AbominationsWrath.png
| link = Abomination’s Wrath
| text = Abomination’s Wrath
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GrotesqueScepter.png
| link = Grotesque Scepter
| text = Grotesque Scepter
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GarmentOfTheBeast.png
| link = Garment of the Beast
| text = Garment of the Beast
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = HorrificClaws.png
| link = Horrific Claws
| text = Horrific Claws
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Lost Golem</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CarvedGolemRemains.png
| link = Carved Golem Remains
| text = Carved Golem Remains
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BrainOfTheGolems.png
| link = Brain of the Golems
| text = Brain of the Golems
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GolemGarments.png
| link = Golem Garments
| text = Golem Garments
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = RustyCuffs.png
| link = Rusty Cuffs
| text = Rusty Cuffs
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Phylactery Mystic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ThePhylactery.png
| link = The Phylactery
| text = The Phylactery
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SoulOfTheBearer.png
| link = Soul of the Bearer
| text = Soul of the Bearer
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheSoullessRobe.png
| link = The Soulless Robe
| text = The Soulless Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheCovetousHeart.png
| link = Ring of the Covetous Heart
| text = Ring of the Covetous Heart
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Priest of Geb</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = WandOfGeb.png
| link = Wand of Geb
| text = Wand of Geb
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = BookOfGeb.png
| link = Book of Geb
| text = Book of Geb
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ShendytOfGeb.png
| link = Shendyt of Geb
| text = Shendyt of Geb
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GebsRingOfWisdom.png
| link = Geb's Ring of Wisdom
| text = Geb's Ring of Wisdom
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Skuld 2 The ReGhostening</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = EtheriteDagger.png
| link = Etherite Dagger
| text = Etherite Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = GhastlyDrape.png
| link = Ghastly Drape
| text = Ghastly Drape
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MantleOfSkuld.png
| link = Mantle of Skuld
| text = Mantle of Skuld
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SpectralRingOfHorrors.png
| link = Spectral Ring of Horrors
| text = Spectral Ring of Horrors
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Swarming Huntress</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = NectarCrossfire.png
| link = Nectar Crossfire
| text = Nectar Crossfire
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HoneytombSnare.png
| link = Honeytomb Snare
| text = Honeytomb Snare
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ApiaryArmor.png
| link = Apiary Armor
| text = Apiary Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = HoneyCirclet.png
| link = Honey Circlet
| text = Honey Circlet
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Swoll Paladin</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = PixieEnchantedSword.png
| link = Pixie-Enchanted Sword
| text = Pixie-Enchanted Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = SealOfTheEnchantedForest.png
| link = Seal of the Enchanted Forest
| text = Seal of the Enchanted Forest
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = FairyPlate.png
| link = Fairy Plate
| text = Fairy Plate
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfPureWishes.png
| link = Ring of Pure Wishes
| text = Ring of Pure Wishes
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Twilight Archmage</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SentientStaff.png
| link = Sentient Staff
| text = Sentient Staff
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AncientSpellPierce.png
| link = Ancient Spell: Pierce
| text = Ancient Spell: Pierce
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheRobeOfTwilight.png
| link = The Robe of Twilight
| text = The Robe of Twilight
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheForgottenRing.png
| link = The Forgotten Ring
| text = The Forgotten Ring
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">River Priest</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheWingedWand.png
| link = The Winged Wand
| text = The Winged Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = BookOfTheRejuvenatingRiver.png
| link = Book of the Rejuvenating River
| text = Book of the Rejuvenating River
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheRiverRobe.png
| link = The River Robe
| text = The River Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WaterFromTheRiver.png
| link = Water from the River
| text = Water from the River
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Fire Wizard</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HeadOfTheFirebreather.png
| link = Head of the Firebreather
| text = Head of the Firebreather
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = The Searing Shower.png
| link = The Searing Shower
| text = The Searing Shower
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = TheIncombustibleRobe.png
| link = The Incombustible Robe
| text = The Incombustible Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FlamesInAbottle.png
| link = Flames in a bottle
| text = Flames in a bottle
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Nature Magician</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = StaffOfNature.png
| link = Staff of Nature
| text = Staff of Nature
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = Spell Full of Nature.png
| link = Spell Full of Nature
| text = Spell Full of Nature
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RobeOfTheNatureGoddess.png
| link = Robe of the Nature Goddess
| text = Robe of the Nature Goddess
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfTheNatureGoddess.png
| link = Ring of the Nature Goddess
| text = Ring of the Nature Goddess
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Dragon Blood Assassin</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FirebreathersTail.png
| link = Firebreather's Tail
| text = Firebreather's Tail
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheSearingBlood.png
| link = The Searing Blood
| text = The Searing Blood
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheScorchedArmor.png
| link = The Scorched Armor
| text = The Scorched Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = EyesOfTheFirebreather.png
| link = Eyes of the Firebreather
| text = Eyes of the Firebreather
}}
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Forest ranger</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WoodenElegance.png
| link = Wooden Elegance
| text = Wooden Elegance
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheSplitArrow.png
| link = The Split Arrow
| text = The Split Arrow
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ChampionsAttire.png
| link = Champion's Attire
| text = Champion's Attire
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = PracticeTarget.png
| link = Practice Target
| text = Practice Target
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Shadow Thief</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ShadowscalesHorn.png
| link = Shadowscale's Horn
| text = Shadowscale's Horn
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ShadowScales.png
| link = Shadow Scales
| text = Shadow Scales
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheHiddenArmor.png
| link = The Hidden Armor
| text = The Hidden Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = WingNecklace.png
| link = Wing Necklace
| text = Wing Necklace
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Forest ninja</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = BrokenBranch.png
| link = Broken Branch
| text = Broken Branch
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TreesmashersTail.png
| link = Treesmasher's Tail
| text = Treesmasher's Tail
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheRelentlessArmor.png
| link = The Relentless Armor
| text = The Relentless Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SpikesOfTheTreesmasher.png
| link = Spikes of the Treesmasher
| text = Spikes of the Treesmasher
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Almandine Protector</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfTheMadGod.png
| link = Sword of the Mad God
| text = Sword of the Mad God
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = OnyxShieldOftheMadGod.png
| link = Onyx Shield of the Mad God
| text = Onyx Shield of the Mad God
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AlmandineArmorOfAnger.png
| link = Almandine Armor of Anger
| text = Almandine Armor of Anger
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AlmandineRingOfWrath.png
| link = Almandine Ring of Wrath
| text = Almandine Ring of Wrath
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Tidal Defender</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheSeaweedSword.png
| link = The Seaweed Sword
| text = The Seaweed Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HeadOfTheRiverborn.png
| link = Head of the Riverborn
| text = Head of the Riverborn
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheDrenchedArmor.png
| link = The Drenched Armor
| text = The Drenched Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TailOfTheRiverborn.png
| link = Tail Of The Riverborn
| text = Tail Of The Riverborn
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Dark Swordsman</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ShadowboneSword.png
| link = Shadowbone Sword
| text = Shadowbone Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ShadowscalesSkull.png
| link = Shadowscale's Skull
| text = Shadowscale's Skull
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = TheScavengersAttire.png
| link = The Scavenger's Attire
| text = The Scavenger's Attire
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Candlestick.png
| link = Candlestick
| text = Candlestick
}}
|}

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
